notes: Flexible IPv4 default rate comes from the Scaleway Virtual Instances pricing page.
Block Storage 5K and 15K rates come from the Scaleway Storage pricing page.
Object Storage rates come from the Scaleway Storage pricing page.
The l_ssd local storage rate is intentionally left null because the public docs do not expose a clean universal per-GB API rate. Fill it manually if you need local volume pricing.
The b_ssd volume rate is mapped to the 5K Block Storage rate as a best-effort approximation.
